author: Jaishy Shivashish
name: SmearGate + OrthoInit + Int6 STE QAT + MLP 3x + Bigram Hash + Sliding Window
blurb: All-in-one submission stacking every proven technique: SmearGate bigram embedding blending, 4096-bucket bigram hash embeddings, MLP 3x expansion (hidden=1536), orthogonal weight init, STE int6 QAT, fp16 tied embedding passthrough, int6 per-row quantization with zstd-22, sliding window eval stride=64, Muon with decoupled weight decay 0.01 and momentum 0.99, tuned LR schedule (warmdown=3000, matrix_lr=0.02).
note: val_bpb and bytes_total to be filled after 8xH100 run
